statement.p: One of the tires on your car looks a little flat. You measure its air pressure and are alarmed to see it so low at {25\ {\rm psi}}\text{.} You have a portable device that can pump air into the tire increasing the pressure at a rate of {{\frac{7}{6}}\ {\textstyle\frac{\rm\mathstrut psi}{\rm\mathstrut min}}}\text{.} How long will it take to fill the tire to the manuals recommended pressure of {32\ {\rm psi}}\text{?}
